name: rx-chart
title: Chart (React)
description: Headless chart engine for the React edition - chart-context (React Context + hooks), scales, axis, cartesian-grid, chart-frame, plus shape helpers (area, line, bar, scatter, pie, polar, radar, radial-bar). Shared base for every styled chart.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use rx-chart.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
